message:
perf: optimize screencast and ACK handling

- ACK every frame immediately (prevents Chrome stalls)
- Remove FPS throttle in render loop (render every frame we get)
- Increase adaptive JPEG quality for smaller screens
- Add everyNthFrame parameter (kept at 1 for now)
- Reduce mouse event logging noise (only log clicks)
- Simplify screencast startup (no restart logic)
